creator: bsd@philippost.de
text:
Created attachment 249650
Add firmware packages for Radeon 780M Graphics to fwget

In Bug 278082 I reported about missing support for AMD Ryzen 7 PRO 7840U's internal Radeon 780M GPU. manu@ was so kind to patch the gpu-firmware-kmod meta-port. This patch adds the required firmware packages to fwget.
